summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented by switching Intrinsic/Actual outputs and dev checks to frontend calculation functions. REQ-3 appears largely satisfied in ResultsSection by removing any backend-driven loading/error UI for those outputs. The diff also introduces multiple UI/UX changes (hero/marketing content, emojis in user-facing toasts) that were not requested and may conflict with constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: Major new/changed marketing-style header and hero section content (illustration, copy about organizing company information, social icons), unrelated to the rollback of pricing/formula usage.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on restoring calculation outputs and removing backend dependency for displayed values; it does not request a redesign or new hero/branding content.

hallucinated_features.description: User-facing toast messages include emoji characters (✅/❌), and dev-check console logs include emoji markers.
hallucinated_features.reason: Constraint says to use English for user-facing text; emojis are not requested and are added to user-facing notifications (toasts).
